turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting a Lost Item or Filing a Minor Police Report

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, um, I want to report a lost item. I’m not sure if I’m in the right place, but I was told to come here first.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s okay, you’re in the right place. What item have you lost?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: My backpack. I realised it was missing last night when I came back home.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright. Can you tell me where you last remember having it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I think at the university library. I stayed there quite late, so maybe around six or six-thirty.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay. Which library was that?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: The main library. Sorry, I don’t know the English name exactly, but the biggest one on campus.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s fine, I understand. Can you describe the backpack for me?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: It’s black, medium size. Inside there was my laptop, some notebooks, and charger.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Do you know the brand of the backpack?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: The brand… I know the logo, but I don’t really know how to say it in English.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s okay. Any other identifying features?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, there is a small Korean flag keychain on the zip.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s helpful. Was there anything particularly valuable inside?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, the laptop is quite expensive. Also my student ID card was inside.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: In that case, I would recommend filing a formal report.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Formal report meaning police report?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s correct.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. I wasn’t sure if it’s necessary, but if you recommend, I’ll do that.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: It helps in case the item is found or if you need documentation later.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Documentation meaning proof?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, proof that you reported it lost.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Ah okay. That makes sense.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I’ll need some details from you. When exactly did you last see the backpack?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I used it at the library before dinner. Then I think I packed everything, but maybe I forgot it on the chair.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: So you’re not completely sure where it was left?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, I’m not one hundred percent sure. That’s why I feel a bit stupid about this.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Don’t worry, this happens quite often.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, that makes me feel better.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Can I take your contact details so we can reach you if it’s found?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. Email is better than phone, because sometimes I miss calls.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem. I’ll record your email address.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you. Can I ask something else?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If someone finds it, do they bring it here, or to the library?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Usually to the library first, and then they notify us.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. So should I also check with the library directly?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s a good idea.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Alright. I’ll do both then.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Do you have ID with you today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Passport is okay?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s fine.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. Thank you for explaining everything clearly. I was a bit nervous.
